_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.
_publications._context: The SNF96.2 (CRL-2884, RRID: CVCL_K281) human MPNST cell line and the HEK-293T (CRL-3216, RRID: CVCL_0063) cell line were obtained from ATCC | The human MPNST cell line sNF96.2, was kindly provided by Dr Abhijit Guha...We confirmed the reported germline mutation in exon 21 (3683delC) | Human MPNST cell lines SNF02.2 and SNF96.2 were propagated in DMEM/10% FBS plus L-glutamine and penicillin/streptomycin | sNF96.2 (a MPNST cell line derived from a patient with NF1, used as target cells) | NF1-associated MPNST cells (sNF96.2, ATCC; MPNST642, MD Anderson; T265, A. Harder) | STS-26T (19), HS-PSS, HS-sch2 (20), S462 (21), and sNF96.2 (22) cell lines were previously established in other laboratories. | sNF96.2 (provided by Dr Thomas De Raedt) | Patient-derived neurofibroma (NF95.11b, NF95.6) or MPNST (SNF02.2, SNF94.3, SNF96.2, ST88-14) cell lines
